infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to find nearby parking spaces.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to find nearby parking spaces.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to upload photos of parking spaces.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to upload photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Parking App to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Parking App to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Parking App to access your camera.
